/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/benchmark/run_eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/trajectory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/native_environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/sandbox_environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/keyword_evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/functional_evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/harness/harness_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/tool_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/exec_tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/file_tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/web_search_tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/memory_tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/tools/calculator_tool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/agent/loop_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/agent/skill_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/agent/agent_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_eval.dir/src/client/ollama_client.cpp.o -o run_eval  -lpthread
